---
title: "Particles"
subtitle: "Add Particles.JS to Quarto HTML documents"
description: "A quarto shortcode extension to add Particles.JS for html and revealjs formats"
author: "Roy Francis"
date: last-modified
date-format: DD-MMM-YYYY
toc: true
number-sections: true
title-block-banner: true
format:
  html:
    code-overflow: wrap
  pdf:
    output-file: index-latex.pdf
    code-overflow: wrap
  typst:
    output-file: index-typst.pdf
    code-overflow: wrap
filters:
  - particles
---

## Install

- Requires Quarto >= 1.4.0  
- In the root of the quarto project, run in terminal:  

```bash
quarto add royfrancis/quarto-particles
```

This will install the extension under the `_extensions` subdirectory.

## Usage

### Minimal usage

- Add `particles` to filters  
- Insert shortcode in the quarto document  

```yaml
---
filters:
  - particles
---

{{{< particles >}}}
```

{{< particles >}}
\

### Customization

You can customize the particles by passing key/value pairs that map onto the particles.js configuration. The wrapper always includes a `quarto-particles-js` class (defined in `_extensions/particles/particles.css`) and the generated `id` as another class—add a `style` attribute or additional CSS if you need explicit sizing or background colors or want per-instance styling. For example:

```lua
{{{< particles
  style="height: 320px; background-color: #0b1c26"
  particles.number.value=120
  particles.color.value="#55acee"
  particles.move.speed=2
  interactivity.events.onhover.mode=grab
  interactivity.modes.grab.distance=250
>}}}
```

{{< particles
  style="height: 320px; background-color: #0b1c26"
  particles.number.value=120
  particles.color.value="#55acee"
  particles.move.speed=2
  interactivity.events.onhover.mode=grab
  interactivity.modes.grab.distance=250
>}}
\

Here is another example with different settings:

```lua
{{{< particles
  style="height: 400px; background-color: #1a1a1a"
  particles.number.value=80
  particles.color.value="#ff5733"
  particles.move.speed=10
  interactivity.events.onhover.mode=bubble
  interactivity.modes.bubble.distance=200
>}}} 
``` 

{{< particles
  style="height: 400px; background-color: #1a1a1a"
  particles.number.value=80
  particles.color.value="#ff5733"
  particles.move.speed=10
  interactivity.events.onhover.mode=bubble
  interactivity.modes.bubble.distance=200
>}}
\

This is a more complex example with many non-default settings:

```lua
{{{< particles
  style="height: 400px; background-color: #000000"
  particles.number.value=400
  particles.number.density.value_area=100
  particles.color.value="#000000"
  particles.shape.stroke.width=2
  particles.shape.stroke.color="#D4F6F0"
  particles.opacity.random=true
  particles.opacity.anim.enable=true
  particles.opacity.anim.speed=10
  particles.opacity.anim.opacity_min=0
  particles.size.value=2
  particles.size.random=true
  particles.line_linked.enable=false
  particles.move.speed=6
  particles.move.random=true
  interactivity.events.onhover.mode=bubble
  interactivity.events.onclick.enable=false
  interactivity.modes.bubble.size=5
  interactivity.modes.bubble.duration=10
  interactivity.modes.bubble.opacity=0
  interactivity.modes.bubble.speed=3
  interactivity.modes.repulse.distance=400
  retina_detect=true
>}}}
```

{{< particles
  style="height: 400px; background-color: #FAFAF9"
  particles.number.value=400
  particles.number.density.value_area=100
  particles.color.value="#000000"
  particles.shape.stroke.width=2
  particles.shape.stroke.color="#D4F6F0"
  particles.opacity.random=true
  particles.opacity.anim.enable=true
  particles.opacity.anim.speed=10
  particles.opacity.anim.opacity_min=0
  particles.size.value=2
  particles.size.random=true
  particles.line_linked.enable=false
  particles.move.speed=6
  particles.move.random=true
  interactivity.events.onhover.mode=bubble
  interactivity.events.onclick.enable=false
  interactivity.modes.bubble.size=5
  interactivity.modes.bubble.duration=10
  interactivity.modes.bubble.opacity=0
  interactivity.modes.bubble.speed=3
  interactivity.modes.repulse.distance=400
  retina_detect=true
>}}
\

See the repo [README](https://github.com/royfrancis/quarto-particles) for full list of arguments.

### Other output formats

The content is simply ignored when the output format is anything other than `html` or `revealjs`.
